title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at Swiggy

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at Swiggy
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Swiggy in Agra offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Swiggy:
Swiggy is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Swiggy!
